arts.ttl: Crystal Palace handed double injury boost as Eberechi Eze returns to squad
arts.sum: Eagles face Newcastle ahead of big week for Oliver Glasner

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace injury news: Oliver Glasner issues Eberechi Eze, Eddie Nketiah update before Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner provides an injury update on Eberechi Eze and Eddie Nketiah ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Newcastle United at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: The key quotes from Glasner's pre-Newcastle press conference
arts.sum: Crystal Palace host Newcastle United at Selhurst Park on Saturday afternoon, looking to build on a solid performance against Aston Villa last weekend.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner provides positive Crystal Palace injury news ahead of Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Greenwich-born Eze returned to training before last weekend’s 2-2 draw with Aston Villa, but the Austrian boss decided to leave the attacking playmaker out of the squad so he could fully recover from the hamstring injury he picked up in the 2-1 win at Villa Park in the EFL Cup. Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Eberechi Eze and Eddie Nketiah will both be involved in Crystal Palace’s matchday squad for tomorrow’s Premier League clash against Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all five games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 13 this weekend and Tom McGarry has collated our writers' best bets for all five games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Read Newcastle programme for Mitchell interview, Glasner, Doc Brown and more...
arts.sum: From the cages of North West London to stepping out at Wembley as an England international, Tyrick Mitchell speaks movingly to the Crystal Palace matchday programme about his long journey to the top of his game and what he has learned along the way.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United receive Crystal Palace news they hoped to avoid as double injury boost confirmed
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner was in high spirits on Friday afternoon as he revealed his side had welcomed back key stars such as Eberechi Eze and Eddie Nketiah to training ahead of this weekend's visit of Newcastle United . The attacking duo, both sidelined with hamstring issues of late, are expected to make Glasner's matchday squad for Saturday's 3pm showdown with Eddie Howe's side, offering a huge boost to the struggling outfit.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Newcastle Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Crystal Palace welcome Newcastle to Selhurst Park on Saturday afternoon as these two lock horns in the Premier League this season. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, p...

arts.ttl: Newcastle injury news: Eddie Howe issues encouraging Bruno Guimaraes, Joe Willock update before Crystal Palace clash
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe provides an update on the fitness of Bruno Guimaraes and Joe Willock ahead of Saturday's Premier League trip to Crystal Palace.
